name: Baked Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 31 1/2 lb Potatoes; peel, cut into 3/4 inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
-------------
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with oil and dressing mixes. Place in two greased 13x9 pans. Bake, uncovered, at 400°F for 45 minutes or until tender.
Cool. Transfer to a large bowl; add peppers, onions, tomatoes, eggs, and bacon. Toss gently. Combine remaining ingredients in a small bowl; mix well. Pour over salad and stir gently. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
